title: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Input
description: An attacker could potentially trigger a denial-of-service attack by sending a large volume of requests to the system or by injecting malicious data that causes the system to consume excessive resources (e.g., CPU, memory, network bandwidth).
affected_component: Application Servers, Database Servers, Network Infrastructure
attack_vector: Malformed requests, oversized data payloads, resource-intensive operations triggered by user input.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting to prevent excessive requests
Validate and sanitize user input to prevent resource-intensive operations
Utilize a web application firewall (WAF) to filter malicious traffic
